title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in dry bulk this week, Tsuneishi announced contracting a firm 65.7k dwt Ultramax with Kambara Kisen. The vessel will be methanol dual fuel and is set to deliver in 2027. Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
